title: Fix RAK4631 puck CoAP startup stall
description: The canonical RAK4631 puck ELF boots, connects to lichen-sim, and transmits four frames, but stalls after LICHEN puck starting before the expected CoAP GET /status marker. Trace initialization and service scheduling after puck main to identify and fix the blocking path.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical rak4631/nrf52840 puck reaches the late CoAP status marker and independently observed TX under the faithful Renode backend; exact commands, hashes, and logs retained; no production service disabled to pass.
close_reason: Coordinated with 5ix1.4.3/5ix1.4.4 diagnostics: updated renode_console.conf for traces, t_echo conf/DTS overlays, lichen native RX thread phases in main.c:538 publish for canary, boards/init fixes for nRF/ESP/RAK/T-Echo/USBD. Startup stalls resolved; reaches main:ready, CoAP status, independent TX on Renode/fleet. All oracles preserved, 3 review passes, EC2 LICHEN-tagged validation. Fixes for listed platforms complete.
